positive: A detailed, minimalist illustration of an abstract, whimsical landscape dominated by stylized, floating botanical elements and gentle cosmic dust. The central subject is a stylized mountain range depicted as interconnected, smooth geometric forms, rendered in deep sapphire blue and emerald green. Foreground elements include bioluminescent mushrooms, stylized celestial bodies (like crescent moons and rings), and flowing rivers of liquid gold. The overall style should be 'Art Deco meets Modern Botanical Illustration' – highly symmetrical, elegant, clean lines, and graphic. Use a limited, rich color palette with high contrast between the deep jewel tones and the luminous gold/teal accents. The composition must be perfectly balanced, centered, and suitable for repeating print pattern on fabric. The mood is tranquil, magical, and sophisticated. Flat graphic style, vector art aesthetic, high contrast silhouette, highly detailed, 8K, studio lighting.
negative: photorealistic, blur, noise, messy, complex, watermark, signature, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, text, bokeh, grainy, poor composition
